text: 1. AFTER his ancient splendour, they, the bold, have drawn the bright milk from The Sage who wins a thousand gifts. 2. In aspect he is like the Sun; he runneth forward to the lakes, Seven currents flowing through the sky. 3. He, shining in his splendour, stands high over all things that exist- Soma, a God as Surya is. 4. Thou, Indu, in thy brilliancy, pourest on us, as Indra's Friend, Wealth from the kine to feast the Gods.

metadata.title: Rig Veda - Mandala 9 Hymn 54
metadata.citation: Rig Veda, Mandala 9, Hymn 54; Ralph T. H. Griffith translation
